case_title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS VS. CLIFTON JACKSON REED

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL BROME OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL and CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Granted, no opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Off Calendar
